name: Tianjin Teda Co., Ltd.
summary: Tianjin TEDA Co., Ltd. engages in the ecological and environmental protection, regional development, energy trade, and equity investment businesses in China. It is involved in the development and utilization of renewable energy, such as municipal solid waste incineration power generation, sanitary landfill, and biomass power generation; and the provision of services for the treatment of domestic waste, as well as utilization of waste heat from incineration of waste to generate electricity. The company also engages in the land consolidation, construction, and development of residential, commercial complex, and security housing and other projects. In addition, it trades in refined oil; petrochemical products, such as gasoline, diesel, fuel oil, aromatic hydrocarbons, naphtha, and lubricants; and non-ferrous metals, including aluminum ingots, zinc ingots, electrolysis commodities, and copper, as well as manages the storage and services of non-ferrous metals and petroleum and petrochemical products. Further, the company is involved in equity investments. Tianjin Teda Co., Ltd. is based in Tianjin, China.
